markdown:
# Potion of Climbing

- **Type**: P|XPHB
- **Weight**: 0.5 lb.

When you drink this potion, you gain a [[climb_speed Speed]] equal to your [[speed]] for 1 hour. During this time, you have [[advantage]] on Strength ([[athletics]]) checks to climb.

This potion is separated into brown, silver, and gray layers resembling bands of stone. Shaking the bottle fails to mix the colors.
